parameters.description: At least one parameter has to be specified.

parameters.name: forecast_offset

schema.description: This parameter allows to access historical forecasts. If this parameter is not set the most recently created forecast is returned. If an integer value is given an older forecast is returned, where value is the 'age' of the forecast. 0 is the most recent forecast, 1 is the second to last forecast, and so on.

coordinates.title: Coordinates

sub_stations.title: Sub Stations
